title: Eris
description: A small but fun Fabric modpack with some uncommon mods.
body:
Eris is a simple modpack that includes some well known and some lesser known Fabric mods. The mod list is currently as follows:

- Ad Astra!
- Adorn
- Applied Energistics 2
- Alloy Forgery
- AppleSkin
- Architectury API
- Auto Config Updated API
- bad packets
- Balm
- Better Combat
- Bits And Chisels
- Blossom
- Botania
- Botarium
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
- Caracal mob
- Cardinal Components API
- Cats Expanded
- CC: Restitched
- Charm
- Charmonium
- Cinderscapes
- Cloth Config API
- Create Fabric
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Custom Splash Screen
- Dawn API
- Deeper and Darker
- Dense Ores: Refabricated
- Drawing
- 'Dustrial Decor Fabric
- Ears (+ Snouts/Muzzles, Tails, Horns, Wings, and More)
- Enhanced Block Entities
- EditSign
- Essential Commands
- Extra Alchemy
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Falling Leaves
- Farmer's Delight [Fabric]
- Feature NBT Deadlock Be Gone
- FerriteCore
- kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric
- Friends&Foes (Fabric)
- Geckolib
- Go Fish
- Handcrafted
- Hex Casting
- Immersive Paintings
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Isometric Renders
- Keymap
- Krypton
- LambDynamicLights
- LazyDFU
- Light Emitting Diode
- libIPN
- Lithium
- Lovely Snails
- Map Atlases
- Meal API
- MEGA Cells
- mine11lib
- Mixin Conflict Helper
- Modern Industrialization
- Mod Menu
- Moonlight Lib
- Mouse Wheelie
- oωo (owo-lib)
-  Paradise Lost
- Patchouli
- PAUCAL
- Pehkui
- playerAnimator
- Pretty Beaches
- Profundis
- Promenade
- Purpeille
- qCraft Reimagined
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Resourceful Config
- Resourceful Lib
- Right-Click-Harvest
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- Sandwichable
- Satin API
- Sodium
- Starlight (Fabric)
- Stendhal
- st'ructure tools
- Subterrestrial
- Terrestria
- Traverse
- Trinkets
- Visuality
- Windchimes
- Winterly
- Wired Redstone
- Wolves Of Other Furs (W.O.O.F)
- WTHIT
